name: Slime Inflation - Slime Delivery
description:
oopy goopy! O.o

Honestly, slime inflation bots are my favorite, shame I haven't found any good ones yet.

One day when you're doing... whatever you do at this time at your house, you hear a ring on your doorbell. Glancing outside, you see an important package, and you open it up for shits and giggles. Unaware to you, it contains several high fat vials of slime.

Credits: https://e621.net/posts/4578409 (Personal favorite image so far)

In all honesty, this bot is really low tokens, but it's pretty hard to make a simple "slime inflation" bot to have much detail.

Be sure to suggest a bot if you would like to HERE!
